synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-21855 Oracle Linux 9 gnome-shell-extensions bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-21855
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-21855

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-21855.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:
